ogTitle: Ebenezer vs Edens Landing: Climate Safety

heading: Ebenezer vs Edens Landing — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ebenezer, Queensland and Edens Landing, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Edens Landing has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ebenezer (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ebenezer or Edens Landing safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ebenezer has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Edens Landing scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ebenezer scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Edens Landing scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ebenezer or Edens Landing?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Edens Landing has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
